issues.description: The file imports from shared/ReactTypes and shared/ReactSymbols, creating tight coupling to shared modules. While necessary, this means changes to these symbols could affect lazy loading functionality.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider abstracting symbol definitions behind an API if they need frequent changes, though this may be over-engineering for this module.

issues.description: The lazyInitializer function is quite complex and handles multiple states (Uninitialized, Pending, Resolved, Rejected). This complexity could be better encapsulated in a separate class or module to improve maintainability.
issues.suggested_fix: Refactor the state machine logic into a dedicated LazyState class that handles transitions and error states more cleanly.

issues.description: The error messages for invalid lazy imports contain a typo: 'imp' is cut off in 'dynamic imp' instead of 'dynamic import'.
issues.suggested_fix: Correct the error message to say 'dynamic import' instead of 'dynamic imp'.

issues.description: The enableAsyncDebugInfo flag controls debug features. While this is appropriate, the flag is imported from shared/ReactFeatureFlags, creating an additional dependency.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider making this flag configurable at build time rather than runtime to reduce dependencies.
